section_name: Distribution of Fees for Registration of Additional Weight
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text:
(a) If an operator or owner is required to pay for registration of additional weight under Section 621.406 (Additional Gross Weight Registration) in a county other than the county in which the owner resides, the assessor-collector of the county in which the payment is made shall send the amount collected to the department for deposit to the credit of the state highway fund.

(b) The department shall send the county’s share of the amount collected under Section 621.406 (Additional Gross Weight Registration) to the county in which the owner resides.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.355 — Distribution of Fees for Registration of Additional Weight

(a) If an operator or owner is required to pay for registration of additional weight under Section 621.406 (Additional Gross Weight Registration) in a county other than the county in which the owner resides, the assessor-collector of the county in which the payment is made shall send the amount collected to the department for deposit to the credit of the state highway fund.

(b) The department shall send the county’s share of the amount collected under Section 621.406 (Additional Gross Weight Registration) to the county in which the owner resides.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall send the county’s share of the amount collected under Section 621.406 (Additional Gross Weight Registration) to the county in which the owner resides.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
